notes: ### Autonomous mode works with all providers (not just Claude)  - The headless harness (`signalos harness call` / `orchestrate`, and product `call_llm`) now routes **all 12 configured providers** — Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Groq, Mistral, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, xAI, Together, Cerebras, DashScope (via one OpenAI-compatible adapter) and local Ollama — from a single source-of-truth provider table. The provider is **auto-detected** from whichever API key is present (override with `SIGNALOS_LLM_PROVIDER`). - The model is **discovered from each provider's API** (best-fit pick) instead of a hardcoded default; override with `SIGNALOS_LLM_MODEL` or `--model`. `DEFAULT_MODEL` is no longer a silent default. The `signal-init` autonomous-mode message is now provider-neutral.
